issues.title: Idempotency eviction race causes duplicate transaction events
issues.body:
Detailed report and analysis for issue 1.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Run the nightly batch
2. Observe the failure

Expected: stable behavior
Observed: intermittent failure under load

comments.body: Initial report: observed during weekly run, reproduces reliably on branch data.
I can reproduce locally; adding traces and a temporary mitigation for investigation.
Agree with the mitigation. Recommend a test-case and a follow-up PR to harden.
